description: Answer keys extracted from PPTX study group files for Past ABT Exams (source 7)

database_status.notes: 38 answer keys populated in dabt.db for 2015 Recert Part A questions (IDs DABT-4499 to DABT-4536)

2015_recert_partB.notes: Has answer markers for Q17-24 but question texts not directly extractable to match DB IDs. PPTX shows answers C,A,B,B,A,C,D,E.

xlsx_compiled.notes: Study group question set referenced to Casarett & Doull, NOT the same as the real exam PDF questions. Different question set.

what_was_not_found.2013_recert: Answer keys NOT embedded in PDFs. PPTX files have discussion but few explicit answer markers.
what_was_not_found.2017_cert: No answer keys found anywhere. No study group PPTX files exist for 2017.
what_was_not_found.remaining_317_db_questions: These include DABT-4487 to DABT-4498 (NAFLD vignettes, 2013 recert leftovers) and DABT-4537 to DABT-4841 (2013 recert Part B/C and 2017 cert questions).
